headline: Prime Day is almost over, but these are still the best Apple deals I've seen
summary: Prime Day is ending, but top Apple deals are still available. Find discounts on popular items like Apple Watch Series 11 and AirPods Pro 3. Many Apple products are at their best prices, with AirPods Pro 3 at $179.

headline: It's the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
summary: It's the final day of Prime Day, with over 140 deals remaining. Discounts cover a wide range of gadgets like TVs, smart home tech, and headphones. Popular deals are selling out fast, so act quickly to grab desired items.

headline: 24 Prime Day deals Verge readers are grabbing before Prime Day ends
summary: Discover the 24 most popular Prime Day deals bought by Verge readers. These reader-backed purchases help identify worthwhile last-minute discounts. Find tested products and community-approved tech before Prime Day concludes.

headline: The 17 best robot vacuum deals you can still get before Prime Day ends
summary: Explore 17 top robot vacuum deals available on Prime Day's final day. Significant discounts make high-quality robot vacuums more affordable. Find sales at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart before the event ends.

headline: Top Prime Day Deals I'm Shopping Today to Help Beat the Summer Heat
summary: IGN highlights Prime Day deals focused on combating summer heat. Discover essential items to keep cool as Prime Day concludes. Last chance to grab deals on summer-themed products.

headline: 7 Best Prime Day TV Deals Under $1,000
summary: Find the 7 best Prime Day TV deals, all under $1,000. Discounts include both gaming-ready and budget-friendly models. Last opportunity to score a new TV before Prime Day concludes.

headline: These Fantasy Book Nooks Are a Magical Addition to Your Mixed Media Library
summary: Discover magical fantasy book nooks on sale for Prime Day. Add unique, immersive decorative pieces to your mixed media collection. Grab these special deals before Prime Day officially ends.

headline: Dead or Alive 6 Last Round Review
summary: Dead or Alive 6 Last Round receives a new review. The game is praised as a great fighting experience. Review notes the core game is excellent but its packaging/monetization is poor.

headline: US conducts strikes on Iran after attack on cargo ship
summary: The US launched retaliatory strikes against Iran. Strikes targeted missile, drone storage, and coastal radar facilities. Action follows an attack on a cargo ship.

headline: Home Office to introduce new asylum routes to UK
summary: The UK Home Office plans to unveil new asylum routes. Routes will be 'capped, safe, and legal.' Aims to restore public confidence in the asylum system.

headline: Hottest June day record broken for third day in row as temperature hits 37.3C
summary: June's hottest day record broken for the third consecutive day. Temperatures reached a scorching 37.3C, with Suffolk being the peak. The intense heatwave is expected to subside over the coming weekend.

headline: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as families desperate for news
summary: Devastating earthquakes in Venezuela have claimed 920 lives. Hundreds more are feared trapped under rubble, prompting urgent rescue efforts. International rescue teams are now arriving to assist in the crisis.
